# Core Dash app dependencies
# Dash pins plotly/dash-core-components/dash-html-components internally.
dash>=2.14.0
# Bootstrap styling + layout helpers
dash-bootstrap-components>=1.6.0
# Enterprise-ready hosting entrypoint
# (gunicorn optional on Windows; retained for Heroku/Render compatibility)
gunicorn>=21.2.0
# Rich grid used on the correction results page
dash-ag-grid>=2.4.0

# Python helpers required by R (reticulate) integration
numpy>=1.23
# DebiasM algorithm executed via reticulate in the DEBIAS method script
DEBIAS-M>=0.1.6
# Convenience data tooling used by a few log helpers and notebooks
pandas>=1.5
